displayText.headline: Loved by 15,000+ Skin Enthusiasts
displayText.subheading: 98% noticed visible radiance within two weeks.
displayText.footer: *Based on an independent 2024 consumer perception study.

style: luxury editorial minimalist product photography diagonal split-screen two-tone
description: A striking diagonal split-screen layout dynamically divides the canvas. The upper-left triangular zone is bathed in deep forest green (#1C2E24), serving as a rich canvas for the elegant Italiana and Lora text elements, rendered in warm cream and accented gold. The lower-right triangular zone provides a clean, alabaster-cream (#F9F6F0) backdrop that highlights the premium amber glass serum bottle. The precise diagonal divide creates an elegant, high-contrast composition that immediately draws attention to the trust metrics and high product ratings.
